summary: Comprehensive testing of GHF Agency admin features and table reservations. Backend admin features achieved 100% success rate. Frontend testing confirmed admin dashboard, authentication flow, and core UI functionality working. All new admin features (event creation, contest creation, photo moderation, table reservations) are fully functional.

minor_issues.issue: Root API endpoint health check returns unknown status
minor_issues.impact: Health check test fails, but API is functional

minor_issues.issue: Admin stats endpoint authentication issue with Bearer tokens
minor_issues.impact: Admin stats endpoint fails in basic backend test

integration_issues.issue: Table reservation buttons not using expected data-testid selectors
integration_issues.note: Functionality works but uses different selectors than expected

passed_tests: User registration and authentication with cookies
Admin event creation with table options (Promo & VIP)
Admin link visibility control (hidden when not logged in)
Admin page tabs (Events, Contests, Photos, Reservations, Tables)
Gallery page with 'Partager une photo' button

medium_priority: Add proper data-testid attributes to table reservation buttons on event detail pages for better testability
Fix admin stats endpoint to work with Bearer token authentication (currently only works with cookies)
low_priority: Add status field to root API endpoint response for better health checks
Consider adding more specific data-testid attributes for gallery items
